metadata.title: Rostand MIGAN | Full Stack Developer & Builder
metadata.description: Full stack developer. I write code the way I think clearly, efficiently, and always with the end user in mind. Lately, that's been a lot of fintech.

hero.bullet1: I'm a full stack developer, I build things that work : web apps, fintech tools, and ideas that refuse to stay in my head.
hero.bullet3_suffix: , an open-source platform for business management professionals in West Africa
hero.cta: Have a project that needs to actually ship? Let's talk
